title: NeuralBridge Marketing Analytics
description: This analytics project aims to diagnose the three compounding bottlenecks that emerged in Q3 2024 to derail demand generation. It will specifically analyze the efficiency of the $1.7M marketing spend against the target of acquiring 420 new customers. Ultimately, the project will provide data-driven solutions to rescue the board-approved growth mandate of reaching $18M ARR by the end of 2025.
